name: motion-captcha
description: Motion-CAPTCHA with a 30-second server-authoritative challenge lifecycle.

scripts.check: node --check server.mjs && node --check lib/security-core.mjs && node --check lib/bounded-state.mjs && node --check lib/ephemeral-mask.mjs && node --check lib/http-security.mjs && node --check lib/cookie-security.mjs && node --check lib/request-schemas.mjs && node --check lib/server-runtime.mjs && node --check lib/server-http.mjs && node --check lib/server-admission.mjs && node --check lib/server-api.mjs && node --check lib/server-router.mjs && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/captcha-api.js && node --check public/captcha-protocol.js && node --check public/captcha-view.js && node --check public/challenge-timer.js && node --check public/index.js && node --check public/motion-model.js && node --check public/motion-renderer.js
scripts.test: node tests/security-core.test.mjs && node tests/http-security.test.mjs && node tests/challenge-timer.test.mjs && node tests/public-surface.test.mjs && node tests/server-admission.test.mjs && node tests/server-integration.test.mjs
